_publications._publicationTitle: Ketotifen Modulates Mast Cell Chemotaxis to Kit-Ligand, but Does Not Impact Mast Cell Numbers, Degranulation, or Tumor Behavior in Neurofibromas of

_contextSnippet: At four hours, the mean concentration of ketotifen in all nerves measured was 14.56 ng/g of nerve tissue
details: Mean concentration of ketotifen in sciatic, brachial, and trigeminal nerve tissue was 14.56 ng/g at four hours after 10 mg/kg dose
